penalties.description: Maximum time reached before completion. Task shows suturing in progress but no final knot completion or suture cutting was observed.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion status. Claude reports incomplete task at maximum time (600s), while GPT reports completion at 240s with suture cutting. Given the fundamental nature of this disagreement and the automatic-zero condition for incomplete tasks, Claude's assessment takes precedence as incomplete task penalties override all other scoring considerations per FLS rubric.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's assessment of incomplete task at maximum time is more conservative and aligns with automatic-zero conditions in FLS rubric
